testcase.name: test_employees_endpoint_still_works

failure.message: AssertionError: Employees endpoint broken: 500 assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_service_users.py:441: in test_employees_endpoint_still_works assert response.status_code == 200, f"Employees endpoint broken: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Employees endpoint broken: 500 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_employee_profile_still_works
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_service_users.py:448: in test_employee_profile_still_works employees = list_response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_compliance_requirements_still_works
testcase.failure:
